title: Curver Knit Medium Storage Basket, Stylish Knit Design & Comfortable Handles, 8 Litres, Misty Blue
features: A stylish storage solution for your bathroom, kitchen, Living room, office or study areas
Exclusive Knit design with comfortable handles, flat inner surface and can be easily stacked
Durable, lightweight and easy to clean with a 3 Litre capacity
External Dimensions: (L x W x H) 30 x 22 x 17 cm
Made in the UK and Europe
Provides a stylish storage solution to any home
description: From the manufacturer Curver Knit Rectangular Storage Basket, Misty Blue, 8 Litre Curver’s Knit range is inspired by the art and nostalgia of knitted textiles. Made from durable, long lasting resin with a natural open weave knit pattern, the Knit range is practical and stylish. The Knit medium rectangular 8 litre storage basket is multi functional and can be used for storing all of your items in a variety of places throughout your home. In your bedroom, for keeping your dressing table or drawers neat and tidy, keeping bathroom accessories together and accessible or in your office and sitting room. With added features such as comfortable handles and being easy to clean, this basket helps keep your storage looking good whilst being easy to use. Main Features Exclusive Knit Design Comfortable Handles Stackable / Nestable Ideal storage solutions for anywhere in your home Bathroom In your bathroom, Curver storage baskets are perfect for organising your towels, toiletries and accessories keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish. Kitchen In your kitchen, Curver storage baskets are perfect for organising all of your spices, accessories,and utensils keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish. Living Room In your living area, Curver storage baskets are perfect for your magazines, blankets and accessories keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish. Office or Study In your office or study area, Curver storage baskets are perfect for your all of your pens, notepads and books keeping everything tidy whilst looking stylish.
